title: Past obstacles to CPO market readiness: Why only now?
title_translation: CPO市场化落地的过往障碍：为何时至今日？

paragraphs.source: Despite its technical superiority, CPO has seen very limited real-world adoption due to several challenges that drive up cost. These include: the complexity of packaging (which costs more than the OEs themselves) and manufacturing, reliability and yield concerns, as well as thermal management issues arising from tightly integrated optical and electrical components. Another hang-up is the lack of industry-wide standardization. Additionally, customers are concerned about serviceability which hinders the transition from traditional pluggable optics to CPO solutions.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Despite its technical superiority, CPO has seen very limited real-world adoption due to several challenges that drive up cost. These include: the complexity of packaging (which costs more than the OEs themselves) and manufacturing, reliability and yield concerns, as well as thermal management issues arising from tightly integrated optical and electrical components. Another hang-up is the lack of industry-wide standardization. Additionally, customers are concerned about serviceability which hinders the transition from traditional pluggable optics to CPO solutions.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Despite its technical superiority, CPO has seen very limited real-world adoption due to several challenges that drive up cost. These include: the complexity of packaging (which costs more than the OEs themselves) and manufacturing, reliability and yield concerns, as well as thermal management issues arising from tightly integrated optical and electrical components. Another hang-up is the lack of industry-wide standardization. Additionally, customers are concerned about serviceability which hinders the transition from traditional pluggable optics to CPO solutions.

pro.text: 尽管共封装光学（CPO）在技术上具有显著优势，但由于多项推高成本的挑战，其在实际部署中仍较为有限。这些挑战包括：封装复杂度（其成本甚至超过光引擎本身）、制造难度、可靠性和良率问题，以及光电组件高度集成带来的热管理难题。另一个障碍是缺乏行业统一的标准化。此外，客户还对可维护性心存顾虑，这阻碍了从传统可插拔光模块向CPO方案的转变。

issues.description: OE首次出现未按术语表要求附注全称和中文解释
使用“光电器件”而非术语表规定的“光引擎（OE）”，且“封装复杂度”翻译腔明显
单句过长，包含多层逻辑，属于翻译腔和句子节奏问题
关键术语未按术语表处理，部分直接使用英文未翻译且未加注
译文语气略显生硬，“探讨”“推动因素”等词带有翻译腔
句子结构可更自然流畅
程度词“极为有限”略强于原文“very limited”

paragraphs.source: Another key customer anxiety is that by adopting CPO, they potentially surrender their ability to control costs. It is much easier to squeeze a larger number of transceiver companies on costs than a smaller set of switch vendors.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Another key customer anxiety is that by adopting CPO, they potentially surrender their ability to control costs. It is much easier to squeeze a larger number of transceiver companies on costs than a smaller set of switch vendors.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Another key customer anxiety is that by adopting CPO, they potentially surrender their ability to control costs. It is much easier to squeeze a larger number of transceiver companies on costs than a smaller set of switch vendors.

pro.text: 另一个关键客户顾虑是，采用共封装光学（CPO）可能意味着他们将失去成本控制权。向大量收发器厂商压价要容易得多，而交换机厂商数量则少得多。

paragraphs.source: Meanwhile, pluggable optics—the incumbent technology that CPO would replace—continue to improve and still offers good enough performance for nearly all applications with far less end user anxiety.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Meanwhile, pluggable optics—the incumbent technology that CPO would replace—continue to improve and still offers good enough performance for nearly all applications with far less end user anxiety.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Meanwhile, pluggable optics—the incumbent technology that CPO would replace—continue to improve and still offers good enough performance for nearly all applications with far less end user anxiety.

pro.text: 与此同时，可插拔光模块作为共封装光学（CPO）试图取代的主流技术仍在持续进步。对于几乎所有应用而言，其性能已足够出色，且给最终用户带来的顾虑也少得多。

paragraphs.source: In the remainder of Part 2, we will dive further into the impetus for adopting CPO. We will start with explaining how SerDes scaling is reaching a plateau, making other interface types such as Wide I/O coupled with CPO necessary, and then step into manufacturing considerations and go to market. We will discuss key individual CPO component such as Optical Engines, Fiber Coupling, External Laser Sources and Modulators. Lastly, we will cover the roadmap for scaling bandwidth from CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: In the remainder of Part 2, we will dive further into the impetus for adopting CPO. We will start with explaining how SerDes scaling is reaching a plateau, making other interface types such as Wide I/O coupled with CPO necessary, and then step into manufacturing considerations and go to market. We will discuss key individual CPO component such as Optical Engines, Fiber Coupling, External Laser Sources and Modulators. Lastly, we will cover the roadmap for scaling bandwidth from CPO.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: In the remainder of Part 2, we will dive further into the impetus for adopting CPO. We will start with explaining how SerDes scaling is reaching a plateau, making other interface types such as Wide I/O coupled with CPO necessary, and then step into manufacturing considerations and go to market. We will discuss key individual CPO component such as Optical Engines, Fiber Coupling, External Laser Sources and Modulators. Lastly, we will cover the roadmap for scaling bandwidth from CPO.

pro.text: 在第二部分的剩余内容中，我们将深入探讨采用CPO的驱动因素。首先将解释SerDes扩展为何已触顶，从而使宽接口结合CPO等其他接口类型成为必要，随后讨论制造考量与市场路径。我们会重点介绍CPO的关键组件，包括光引擎（Optical Engine, OE）、光纤耦合、外部激光源（External Laser Source, ELS）以及调制器（Modulator）。最后，我们将阐述CPO带宽扩展的路线图。
